description: Biome tile configuration for BiomeRenderer — 11 individual 142×142 PNGs (8 core + 3 desert variants)

hot_desert.label: Hot Desert
hot_desert.description: Sandy dune desert with golden/orange tones (Sahara-type)

cold_desert.label: Cold Desert
cold_desert.description: Rocky gravel desert with grey-brown tones (Gobi-type)

polar_desert.label: Polar Desert
polar_desert.description: Uniform white ice sheet with minimal life (Antarctic interior)

forest.label: Forest
forest.description: Dense temperate woodland with mixed canopy

grasslands.label: Grasslands
grasslands.description: Open grassy plains with low seasonal rainfall

jungle.label: Jungle
jungle.description: Dense tropical rainforest with high humidity

tropical_jungle.label: Tropical Jungle
tropical_jungle.description: Ultra-dense tropical canopy with layered understory (distinct from standard jungle)

savanna.label: Savanna
savanna.description: Grassy plains with scattered trees (tropical grassland)

ocean.label: Ocean
ocean.description: Deep open water, saltwater or alien equivalent

plains.label: Plains
plains.description: Flat low-elevation terrain with sparse ground cover

swamp.label: Swamp
swamp.description: Saturated lowland terrain with stagnant water and dense reeds

tundra.label: Tundra
tundra.description: Cold treeless biome with permafrost and low ground cover
